lines.text: Has the perfume, compact, and jewelry set arrived?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Tonight… No, I'll take them now.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: If I remember correctly, the one Mr. Gilberto picked up last week looked very similar. If it's your first mask, a unique design might be more fitting?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: I'll be on my way now.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: *cough*... Thank you. I'm okay now. Who are you? ... And Wuli, is he...
